chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3238 of 2019 Shamoona Sadaf & others Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA 14631/19 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 06.05.2025 Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo for petitioners. -.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioners, on instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Head of Const. Benches Judge
